---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for axon
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem?**
A clear description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've thought about.

**Would this feature work air-gapped?**
axon must work fully offline. Does this feature require internet access? If so, can it be opt-in?

**Additional context**
Anything else — sketches, references to similar projects, etc.
